---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement, needs-triage'
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Example: "I'm frustrated when..."

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## For new MCP tools

- What CDP data does it expose?
- What would an AI assistant do with the output?
- Example prompt that would use this tool:

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help test it
